headline: MORE THAN A NAME ON THE LICENCE
subheading: What the MHRA truly expects of a credible Responsible Person on your WDA(H).
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury abstract editorial composition evoking the authority and accountability of a pharmaceutical Responsible Person under UK Good Distribution Practice. A pristine official seal or embossed certification medallion in brushed steel rests at the centre of a deep navy surface, connected by clean glowing teal and cyan lines to a constellation of floating translucent glass elements: a temperature-monitored cold-chain storage cabinet rendered as a luminous cyan wireframe, neatly stacked medicinal cartons, an audit-trail ribbon of softly glowing data nodes, and a delicate chain-link motif symbolising an unbroken yet halt-able supply chain. A single subtle fresh-green accent light marks one verified checkpoint node. Soft volumetric light falls from above onto immaculate brushed-metal and frosted-glass surfaces, shallow depth of field, calm cool shadows receding into navy. Premium, authoritative, quietly confident. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
